capabilities.label: Full System Scan
capabilities.done_when: scan completed successfully
capabilities.note: Scans all vehicle modules and systems; may take 2-3 minutes on full vehicles

capabilities.label: Single Module Scan
capabilities.done_when: module scan finished
capabilities.note: Target specific modules: ECM, TCM, ABS, BCM, etc.

capabilities.label: Read Diagnostic Trouble Codes
capabilities.done_when: all codes displayed
capabilities.note: Retrieves pending, confirmed, and history codes from all modules

capabilities.label: Clear Diagnostic Trouble Codes
capabilities.done_when: codes cleared
capabilities.note: Clears all trouble codes; vehicle may require drive cycle for some systems

capabilities.label: Read Freeze Frame Data
capabilities.done_when: freeze frame data displayed
capabilities.note: Captures snapshot of vehicle conditions when DTC was triggered

capabilities.label: Engine Live Data PIDs
capabilities.done_when: data streaming
capabilities.note: Monitor fuel trim, oxygen sensors, MAF, IAT, coolant temp, RPM in real-time

capabilities.label: Transmission Live Data PIDs
capabilities.done_when: data streaming
capabilities.note: View gear selection, fluid temp, pressure, shift points, and TCM parameters

capabilities.label: ABS Live Data PIDs
capabilities.done_when: data streaming
capabilities.note: Monitor wheel speed sensors, ABS pump status, and brake pressure values

capabilities.label: Oil Change Service Reset
capabilities.done_when: oil service interval reset
capabilities.note: Resets the service interval timer after oil and filter replacement

capabilities.label: Electronic Parking Brake Service Reset
capabilities.done_when: epb service reset complete
capabilities.note: Resets EPB after brake pad replacement; vehicle must be on level ground

capabilities.label: Throttle Position Relearn
capabilities.done_when: throttle relearn successful
capabilities.note: Resets electronic throttle to factory baseline; may require ignition cycles

capabilities.label: TPMS Sensor Reset and Relearn
capabilities.done_when: tpms sensors learned
capabilities.note: Relearns tire pressure sensor IDs; drive vehicle at 25+ mph after reset

capabilities.label: Battery Charge State Registration
capabilities.done_when: battery registered
capabilities.note: Re-registers battery with BMS after replacement; requires full charge

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Calibration
capabilities.done_when: steering angle calibrated
capabilities.note: Resets steering angle sensor after alignment; vehicle must be centered

capabilities.label: DPF Regeneration
capabilities.done_when: dpf regeneration complete
capabilities.note: Performs active DPF regeneration; requires 20+ minutes and steady RPM

capabilities.label: Transmission Adaptive Learning Reset
capabilities.done_when: transmission learning reset
capabilities.note: Resets TCM adaptive learning after ECU/TCM replacement; drive cycle required

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Enable/Disable Command
capabilities.done_when: fuel pump commanded
capabilities.note: Commands fuel pump on/off to verify operation and pressure; listen for pump

capabilities.label: Fuel Injector Pulse Test
capabilities.done_when: injector test complete
capabilities.note: Tests each injector individually; requires engine off or cranking mode

capabilities.label: EVAP Purge Solenoid Test
capabilities.done_when: evap test complete
capabilities.note: Commands EVAP purge solenoid and vent valve; listen for clicking sounds

capabilities.label: Cooling Fan Control Test
capabilities.done_when: fan control test complete
capabilities.note: Commands fan at multiple speeds (20%, 40%, 50%, 70%, 90%); listen for fan

capabilities.label: Glow Plug Cycle Test
capabilities.done_when: glow plug test complete
capabilities.note: Tests glow plug relay and circuits on diesel engines; check for heat

capabilities.label: PATS Key Add/Learn
capabilities.done_when: key programming successful
capabilities.note: Programs new PATS keys; requires valid blue transponder keys; max 8 keys

capabilities.label: PATS Key Erase All
capabilities.done_when: all keys erased
capabilities.note: Erases all PATS keys from system; must reprogram minimum 2 keys afterward

capabilities.label: ECU Firmware Programming
capabilities.done_when: ecu programming successful
capabilities.note: Updates ECU firmware; requires stable power and uninterrupted connection

capabilities.label: Immobilizer System Initialization
capabilities.done_when: immobilizer initialized
capabilities.note: Initializes immobilizer after PCM replacement; requires valid keys present

capabilities.label: Parameter Coding
capabilities.done_when: parameters coded successfully
capabilities.note: Customizes vehicle parameters like units, language, comfort settings

capabilities.label: Feature Coding and Customization
capabilities.done_when: features coded successfully
capabilities.note: Enables/disables features: daytime running lights, interior lighting, door locks

capabilities.label: As-Built Data Programming
capabilities.done_when: asbuilt data written
capabilities.note: Programs module configuration data; requires exact vehicle specifications

capabilities.label: ABS Brake System Bleed
capabilities.done_when: abs bleed procedure complete
capabilities.note: Bleeds air from ABS system after master cylinder or module replacement

capabilities.label: Body Control Module Configuration
capabilities.done_when: bcm configured successfully
capabilities.note: Configures BCM after replacement; programs comfort and lighting settings

capabilities.label: Instrument Panel Cluster Reset
capabilities.done_when: ipc reset complete
capabilities.note: Clears IPC fault memory and recalibrates display; syncs with BCM

capabilities.label: Transmission Control Module Reset
capabilities.done_when: tcm reset complete
capabilities.note: Resets TCM after replacement; requires drive cycle for learning reestablishment

capabilities.label: ABS Module Post-Replacement Programming
capabilities.done_when: abs module programmed
capabilities.note: Programs new ABS module VIN and calibration data after hardware replacement

capabilities.label: Read Freeze Frame Data
capabilities.done_when: Freeze Frame Retrieved
capabilities.note: Displays sensor snapshots captured when DTC was set. Critical for intermittent issue diagnosis.

capabilities.label: Body Control Module Live Data
capabilities.done_when: Data Stream Active
capabilities.note: Real-time BCM PIDs: lighting, door locks, windows, wipers, mirror positions, TPMS pressures.

capabilities.label: Tire Pressure Sensor Relearn
capabilities.done_when: TPMS Relearn Complete
capabilities.note: Relearns tire sensor IDs after wheel rotation or sensor replacement. Requires new sensors to be programmed first.

capabilities.label: Active Fuel Management System Relearn
capabilities.done_when: AFM Relearn Complete
capabilities.note: Relearns cylinder deactivation parameters on 4.3L and 5.3L engines. Improves fuel economy and performance.

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Command Test
capabilities.done_when: Fuel Pump Running
capabilities.note: Commands fuel pump on/off for testing. Verify pump operation and pressure under load.

capabilities.label: Fuel Injector Pulse Test
capabilities.done_when: Injector Pulse Active
capabilities.note: Pulses individual fuel injectors for balance testing. Verify equal spray patterns and fuel delivery.

capabilities.label: EVAP System Purge Test
capabilities.done_when: Purge Solenoid Activated
capabilities.note: Commands EVAP purge solenoid and charcoal canister vent valve. Listen for solenoid clicks and monitor fuel vapor flow.

capabilities.label: AC Compressor Clutch Cycle Test
capabilities.done_when: AC Clutch Cycling
capabilities.note: Cycles AC compressor clutch on/off for verification. Confirms electrical circuit and compressor engagement.

capabilities.label: Cooling Fan Speed Control Test
capabilities.done_when: Fan Speed Test Complete
capabilities.note: Commands electric cooling fans to low/high speed. Verify motor operation and PWM control.

capabilities.label: Key Fob Programming
capabilities.done_when: Key Programming Complete
capabilities.note: Programs remote keyless entry fobs to vehicle BCM. Requires dealer-level database access. May need existing fob.

capabilities.label: Body Control Module Configuration
capabilities.done_when: BCM Configuration Complete
capabilities.note: Configures BCM for optional features (sunroof, power seat memory, auto locks). Tech2-equivalent function.

capabilities.label: Parameter Coding and Adjustment
capabilities.done_when: Parameter Coding Complete
capabilities.note: Modifies ECM/TCM/BCM calibration parameters (shift points, idle speed, thresholds). Affects performance and economy.

capabilities.label: Feature Coding and Activation
capabilities.done_when: Feature Coding Complete
capabilities.note: Enables/disables hidden vehicle features (speed limiter, daytime running lights, comfort features).

capabilities.label: RPO Code Configuration
capabilities.done_when: RPO Configuration Complete
capabilities.note: Programs RPO (Regular Production Option) codes for optional equipment recognition (towing, AWD, special editions).

capabilities.label: Transmission Adaptive Learning Reset
capabilities.done_when: Transmission Adapt Complete
capabilities.note: Clears transmission shift adapts and relearns pressure tables. Perform after transmission service or TCM replacement.

capabilities.label: Instrument Cluster Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Cluster Initialization Complete
capabilities.note: Initializes instrument cluster calibration and mileage. Perform after cluster replacement.

capabilities.label: Passlock Security System Relearn
capabilities.done_when: Passlock Relearn Complete
capabilities.note: Relearns Passlock immobilizer system. 10-30min procedure. Check battery voltage (13.5V+). Security light must turn off.

capabilities.label: Door and Window Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Door/Window Initialization Complete
capabilities.note: Calibrates power window and door lock motor end positions. Required after BCM service or component replacement.

capabilities.label: Immobilizer Service and Key Sync
capabilities.done_when: Immobilizer Service Complete
capabilities.note: Syncs new keys or reprogram immobilizer database. Requires existing key or OEM database.

capabilities.label: Sunroof Motor Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Sunroof Calibration Complete
capabilities.note: Calibrates sunroof open/close limits. Perform after motor replacement or jamming repair.

capabilities.label: ABS Module Live Data
capabilities.done_when: Data Stream Active
capabilities.note: Real-time ABS PIDs: wheel speeds, pump status, solenoid duty, brake pressure, fault flags.

capabilities.label: Adaptive Headlight Aiming
capabilities.done_when: Headlight Aiming Complete
capabilities.note: Calibrates adaptive/LED headlight beam patterns and leveling motors. Required after collision repair.

capabilities.label: Speed Limiter Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Speed Limiter Configuration Complete
capabilities.note: Enables/disables and adjusts max vehicle speed limiter threshold for fleet management.

capabilities.label: Full System Module Scan (ECM, BCM, SAS, ABS, TCM)
capabilities.done_when: Module list displayed
capabilities.note: Scans all primary modules in sequence; supported on 2007+ vehicles with CAN

capabilities.label: FCA Security Gateway Module with AutoAuth
capabilities.done_when: SGW module accessed and scanned
capabilities.note: 2017+ vehicles; requires AutoAuth registration; bypasses SGM encryption

capabilities.label: Read and Clear Codes (All Modules)
capabilities.done_when: Code list cleared or display refreshed
capabilities.note: ECM, BCM, TCM, ABS, SRS, EPB, TPMS supported; clears permanent codes

capabilities.label: Freeze Frame and DTC Snapshot Analysis
capabilities.done_when: Snapshot data displayed with conditions
capabilities.note: Captures fault conditions at time of code set; aids root-cause analysis

capabilities.label: Pending and Inactive Code Inspection
capabilities.done_when: Pending/inactive codes listed with status
capabilities.note: Identifies emerging faults before they become permanent; 2007+ vehicles

capabilities.label: Engine Live Data (RPM, Load, Fuel Trim, O2 Sensors)
capabilities.done_when: Real-time parameter stream active
capabilities.note: Gas and diesel engines; monitors fuel trims, oxygen sensor voltage, load

capabilities.label: Transmission Live Data (Shift Solenoid PWM, Oil Temp)
capabilities.done_when: TCM solenoid duty cycle and temperature streaming
capabilities.note: 4-speed, 5-speed, 6-speed, 8-speed, 10-speed transmissions; real-time PWM

capabilities.label: ABS Brake System Live Data (Pressure, Wheel Speed)
capabilities.done_when: ABS solenoid duty cycle and four-wheel speed data active
capabilities.note: ABS modulator diagnostic; tracks wheel slip and solenoid control

capabilities.label: Oil Change Maintenance Reset
capabilities.done_when: Oil life counter reset to 100%
capabilities.note: Clears oil change reminder in instrument cluster; 2007+ vehicles

capabilities.label: Electric Parking Brake (EPB) Calibration and Bleed
capabilities.done_when: EPB motor positioned and calibrated; bleed cycle complete
capabilities.note: Required after pad replacement; EPB motors must be homed and ABS bled

capabilities.label: Electronic Throttle Control (ETC) Relearn
capabilities.done_when: ECM idle trim values updated and saved
capabilities.note: Must be performed after ECM disconnect or throttle body service; critical for idle stability

capabilities.label: TPMS Sensor ID Relearning
capabilities.done_when: All four tire sensors recognized and stored in BCM
capabilities.note: Pairing of new TPMS sensors to vehicle receiver; prevents dash warning light

capabilities.label: Battery Registration and BMS Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Battery capacity and state stored in BMS; charge cycle logged
capabilities.note: Registers new battery with BMS; enables Start-Stop and hybrid battery algorithms; 2015+

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor (SAS) Calibration
capabilities.done_when: SAS offset zeroed and stored in ESP module
capabilities.note: Required after suspension work or wheel alignment; affects ESP and ABS accuracy

capabilities.label: Diesel Particulate Filter (DPF) Active Regeneration
capabilities.done_when: DPF temperature reached and soot burn-off complete (20-40 minutes)
capabilities.note: RAM 2500/3500 diesel, Fiat 2.0 HDi; graphical UI shows exhaust temperature and pressure

capabilities.label: Transmission Adaptive Learning and Relearning
capabilities.done_when: TCM adaptation values cleared; relearn cycles initiated
capabilities.note: Required after TCM reprogramming; resets shift map to factory baseline; 30-50 miles driving

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Actuation Test
capabilities.done_when: Fuel pump audibly primed; pressure verified
capabilities.note: Direct ECM control of fuel pump relay; can be pulsed for prime or held on

capabilities.label: Fuel Injector Pulse and Cylinder Balance Test
capabilities.done_when: Injectors fire sequentially; cylinder balance measured
capabilities.note: Tests all cylinders for equal pulse width; identifies sticking injectors and lean cylinders

capabilities.label: EVAP Canister Purge Valve Control Test
capabilities.done_when: Purge valve solenoid energized; hiss heard or pressure verified
capabilities.note: Activates EVAP purge valve solenoid; confirms response and no stuck condition

capabilities.label: Hybrid Electric Water Pump Actuation (4xe Jeep)
capabilities.done_when: EWP motor activated; coolant circulation verified
capabilities.note: Jeep Wrangler 4xe, Grand Cherokee 4xe; confirms EWP operation for battery thermal management

capabilities.label: SKIM/SKREEM Immobilizer Key Learning (Dealer-Level)
capabilities.done_when: New key recognized by SKIM module; PIN entry confirmed
capabilities.note: PIN required for access; creates new SKIM keys after loss; multiple keys supported; 2007-2012

capabilities.label: FOBIK Remote Key Programming
capabilities.done_when: Remote button test confirms pairing; all buttons functional
capabilities.note: Programs push-button FOBIK remotes to BCM; up to 8 remotes per vehicle; 2007+

capabilities.label: ECM Flash Reprogramming and Reflash
capabilities.done_when: New firmware verified and persisted; ECM validates checksum
capabilities.note: OEM-level ECM calibration update; requires power stability; DOIP/CAN FD on 2018+

capabilities.label: Proximity Sensor Alignment and Coding
capabilities.done_when: Proximity module aligned to BCM; threshold values calibrated
capabilities.note: Passive entry sensor calibration; aligns detection field after module replacement; 2013+

capabilities.label: BCM (Body Control Module) Feature Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Feature bits updated and stored; door locks and lighting functions verified
capabilities.note: Enables/disables comfort features: auto-lock, auto-window, perimeter lighting, keyless entry

capabilities.label: Instrument Cluster Country Code and Unit Selection
capabilities.done_when: Cluster resets and displays in target country format; mph/kmh, C/F verified
capabilities.note: Sets market configuration: US/EU/Canada; fuel economy units; temperature display; 2010+

capabilities.label: ABS Module Bleed and Initialization
capabilities.done_when: ABS pump cycles complete; brake pressure normalized
capabilities.note: Post-service bleed removes air from ABS lines after ECU or wheel work; critical for safety

capabilities.label: Transfer Case Shift Motor Calibration and Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Motor positioned to neutral; position sensor synchronized
capabilities.note: Jeep Wrangler, Cherokee, Grand Cherokee; re-homes electric shift motor after replacement

capabilities.label: Electronic Shifter Module Learning and Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Shifter detents recognized; gear selection validated
capabilities.note: Models with electronic PRNDL shifter (non-mechanical); calibrates shifter position sensor

capabilities.label: Transmission Solenoid Functional Test (All Shift Solenoids)
capabilities.done_when: All solenoids energized; duty cycle confirmed for each
capabilities.note: Tests A, B, C, and pressure solenoids; identifies stuck or open conditions; real-time PWM

capabilities.label: Hybrid Powertrain Mode and Battery State Live Data
capabilities.done_when: Real-time hybrid mode (EV/Hybrid/Charge Sustain) and battery SoC streaming
capabilities.note: Jeep 4xe models; monitors battery voltage, current, state of charge, thermal management

capabilities.label: Crankshaft Position Relearn and Sync
capabilities.done_when: ECM crankshaft sync offset stored; no cam/crank codes present
capabilities.note: Required after crank sensor replacement or timing work; ECM learns sensor phase offset

capabilities.label: ABS Module Firmware Reprogramming
capabilities.done_when: ABS firmware version updated; module validated
capabilities.note: ABS/ESP module calibration update; supports CAN FD on 2018+ vehicles

capabilities.label: Air Suspension Level Calibration (RAM 1500 Air Suspension)
capabilities.done_when: Air spring pressure and ride height verified and stored
capabilities.note: RAM 1500 with air suspension; calibrates system after service or compressor replacement

capabilities.label: EVAP System Leak Detection Test
capabilities.done_when: Test pressure plateaued and held; leak rate measured
capabilities.note: Active smoke test simulation; ECM pressurizes and vents EVAP to detect leaks; 2007+

capabilities.label: Read Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs)
capabilities.done_when: Code list displayed with descriptions
capabilities.note: Retrieves active and stored fault codes from all vehicle systems

capabilities.label: Read Vehicle Live Data Stream
capabilities.done_when: Data stream active and refreshing
capabilities.note: Streaming sensor data from ECU and modules in real-time

capabilities.label: Read Full DTC Information
capabilities.done_when: DTC codes, definitions, and freeze frame data displayed
capabilities.note: Includes freeze frame data, occurrence count, and fault description

capabilities.label: Read Historical/Pending Codes
capabilities.done_when: Historical code list displayed
capabilities.note: Toyota historics are critical for intermittent fault diagnosis; shows codes that may not be currently active

capabilities.label: Monitor Hybrid Battery Health & Voltage
capabilities.done_when: HV battery voltage, SOC, temperature, fan status displayed
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; monitors HV battery health, charge state, thermistor readings, cooling fan activity

capabilities.label: Monitor ABS and Brake System Data
capabilities.done_when: Wheel speeds, brake pressure, solenoid status, ABS activation displayed
capabilities.note: Critical for post-alignment verification; shows all ABS module parameters and brake status

capabilities.label: TPMS Sensor Registration
capabilities.done_when: All 4 tire sensors detected and registered
capabilities.note: Registers new TPMS sensors after replacement; verifies tire pressure sensor ID programming

capabilities.label: Battery System Reset / Battery Replacement Registration
capabilities.done_when: Confirmation: Battery registration complete
capabilities.note: Clears low battery faults and registers new battery 12-digit code; essential after main battery replacement

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor (SAS) Zero Point Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Message: Zero point calibration complete, steering wheel centered
capabilities.note: Critical post-alignment procedure; must be performed on level surface with stationary vehicle; Prius uses pins 4/12

capabilities.label: Hybrid HV Battery Cooling Fan Control & Reset
capabilities.done_when: Message: Hybrid cooling fan system reset, fan responds to temperature commands
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; resets cooling fan monitor after thermistor replacement; clears P0A82 code

capabilities.label: Transmission ECU Thermistor Reset
capabilities.done_when: Confirmation: Transmission thermistor reset successful
capabilities.note: Resets transmission fluid temperature sensor calibration after replacement

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Actuator Test
capabilities.done_when: Fuel pump energized and de-energized on command
capabilities.note: Bi-directional test to verify fuel pump operation; listen for pump cycling

capabilities.label: EVAP Purge Control Solenoid Test
capabilities.done_when: Solenoid clicks audible, EVAP valve opens/closes on command
capabilities.note: Tests canister purge solenoid response; verifies emissions system valve operation

capabilities.label: A/F Sensor Heater Control
capabilities.done_when: Heater voltage applied/removed, sensor reaches operating temp
capabilities.note: Tests air/fuel ratio sensor heater element; monitors heater circuit response and sensor warm-up

capabilities.label: Hybrid Inverter PWM Control
capabilities.done_when: Inverter responds to PWM control, current monitored
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; controls inverter boost/throttle; essential for hybrid system diagnostics

capabilities.label: ABS Brake Bleeding & Hybrid Regenerative Brake Balance
capabilities.done_when: All 4 wheels bled in correct sequence, regen blending verified
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; Toyota has critical bleed sequence (FL-FR-RR-RL for most, varies by platform); coordinates hydraulic and regen braking

capabilities.label: Key / Immobilizer Programming
capabilities.done_when: New key recognized by vehicle, starts engine, immobilizer disarmed
capabilities.note: Registers new transponder keys to immobilizer; supports 8A/8C/8E/4C/4D/4E/48/7935/7936/7938/7939 chips

capabilities.label: Smart Key System Registration
capabilities.done_when: Smart key paired with vehicle, unlock/lock functions verified
capabilities.note: Registers proximity fob and push-button start keys; requires specific pairing protocol per model

capabilities.label: ECU Customization / Personalization
capabilities.done_when: Custom parameters written to ECU, vehicle behavior adjusted
capabilities.note: Online ECU coding, parameterization, and component matching after ECU replacement or update

capabilities.label: Option Code Setting / Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Configuration options applied, system response verified
capabilities.note: Sets optional features and system behavior codes; requires matching adaptation values

capabilities.label: Sliding Door Auto-Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Sliding doors detect obstacles and auto-stop on command
capabilities.note: Configures automatic open/close sensors and safety limits for vehicles with power sliding doors

capabilities.label: Hybrid Trim-Specific Coding Setup
capabilities.done_when: Hybrid parameters configured for trim level (EV mode, battery limits, etc.)
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; sets EV-only mode parameters, battery pack capacity, cooling thresholds based on trim

capabilities.label: ABS Bleed Sequence (Toyota-Specific Order)
capabilities.done_when: All 4 wheels bled in manufacturer order, no air in system
capabilities.note: Critical post-brake work; Toyota has very specific bleed order (Front-Left, Front-Right, Rear-Right, Rear-Left for most platforms)

capabilities.label: Multi-Axis Zero Point Calibration (Steering, Yaw, Deceleration)
capabilities.done_when: All sensors report zero reference, vehicle drives straight
capabilities.note: Calibrates steering wheel center, yaw sensor, and deceleration sensor on level surface with stationary engine

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor Learn After Wheel Alignment
capabilities.done_when: SAS learned new center position, alignment confirmed in code
capabilities.note: Must follow four-wheel alignment; ensures ESC/VSC uses correct steering reference after suspension work

capabilities.label: ADAS Camera Calibration & Verification
capabilities.done_when: Camera alignment verified, lane detection and collision warnings functional
capabilities.note: Newer models with lane departure warning, adaptive cruise; critical for safety after windshield replacement

capabilities.label: Transmission Adaptive Shift Learning
capabilities.done_when: Shift points reset to factory, adaption relearned through drive cycle
capabilities.note: Resets learned transmission shift behavior after fluid change or ECU reprogramming

capabilities.label: Hybrid Battery End-of-Life Testing
capabilities.done_when: Battery capacity, resistance, and cell balance verified against thresholds
capabilities.note: Hybrid-only function; comprehensive battery health assessment before replacement; measures capacity fade and internal resistance

capabilities.label: Engine System Scan
capabilities.done_when: Scan complete, DTCs displayed
capabilities.note: Full engine control module diagnostic scan for DTCs and freeze frame data

capabilities.label: Transmission System Scan
capabilities.done_when: Transmission DTCs retrieved
capabilities.note: Automatic transmission (AT/CVT) diagnostic scan with shift solenoid codes

capabilities.label: VSA/ABS Live Data
capabilities.done_when: VSA module parameters displaying
capabilities.note: Monitor wheel speeds, slip conditions, solenoid activation, hydraulic pressure

capabilities.label: Transmission Live Data
capabilities.done_when: Gear selection and torque data streaming
capabilities.note: Monitor current gear, line pressure, solenoid duty cycle, TCM parameters

capabilities.label: Oil Change Maintenance Reset
capabilities.done_when: Maintenance light extinguished, service reset confirmed
capabilities.note: Reset oil maintenance reminder and service indicator light after oil service

capabilities.label: Electronic Parking Brake Calibration
capabilities.done_when: EPB stroke initialization complete
capabilities.note: Recalibrate EPB module after brake service or pad replacement

capabilities.label: Throttle Body Cleaning & Idle Relearn
capabilities.done_when: Idle learned, stable RPM confirmed
capabilities.note: Complete throttle position sensor reset and PCM idle learning after throttle body cleaning

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor Calibration (VSA)
capabilities.done_when: Steering angle zero point established
capabilities.note: Calibrate steering angle sensor for VSA system after steering wheel alignment or replacement

capabilities.label: CVT Fluid Temperature Reset
capabilities.done_when: CVT learning parameters cleared
capabilities.note: Reset CVT fluid condition monitoring and thermal learning after fluid flush or replacement

capabilities.label: Brake Fluid Replacement Reminder Reset
capabilities.done_when: Service reminder cleared, brake fluid age reset
capabilities.note: Reset brake fluid service interval and reminder indicator after brake system maintenance

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Control Test
capabilities.done_when: Fuel pump engaged, pressure verified
capabilities.note: Activate fuel pump relay for pressure test; monitor ECU commands

capabilities.label: Fuel Injector Activation Test
capabilities.done_when: Injectors pulsing at specified frequency
capabilities.note: Command individual cylinder fuel injectors on/off; verify solenoid response

capabilities.label: EVAP Purge Solenoid Test
capabilities.done_when: Purge solenoid state confirmed
capabilities.note: Energize EVAP canister purge control solenoid; verify valve operation

capabilities.label: VSA Solenoid Actuation Test
capabilities.done_when: Solenoid clicking confirmed, modulator response verified
capabilities.note: Command VSA hydraulic solenoids; verify modulator valve response and brake fluid flow

capabilities.label: A/C Compressor Clutch Control
capabilities.done_when: Compressor clutch engaged/disengaged as commanded
capabilities.note: Engage and disengage A/C compressor clutch; verify refrigerant pressure response

capabilities.label: Immobilizer Key Registration
capabilities.done_when: Key registered to module, engine start test passed
capabilities.note: Register new or replacement key to immobilizer ECU; supports ID47 and ID4D transponder types

capabilities.label: HDS Module Replacement Programming
capabilities.done_when: Module initialized, VIN and calibration data programmed
capabilities.note: Program replacement ECU with vehicle VIN, calibration, and learned parameters via XPROG interface

capabilities.label: Full ECU Programming
capabilities.done_when: Firmware flashed, module verified
capabilities.note: Reflash engine control module firmware for updates or recovery after corruption

capabilities.label: Option Setup Coding
capabilities.done_when: Options configured, system reboot confirmed
capabilities.note: Configure vehicle options: mirror type, door locks, keyless entry, power windows, HVAC mode defaults

capabilities.label: Lane Watch Camera Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Camera calibration pattern centered on display
capabilities.note: Recalibrate Honda LaneWatch right-side camera alignment after windshield replacement or module swap

capabilities.label: Headlight Aim Memory Coding
capabilities.done_when: Aim position stored, vertical adjustment range verified
capabilities.note: Store correct headlight aiming position in module after adjustment or headlight assembly replacement

capabilities.label: VSA Modulator Bleed & Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Air purged from modulator, system pressure normal
capabilities.note: Execute VSA modulator bleeding sequence post-service; pumps fluid through circuits to remove trapped air

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Neutral position stored, system ready
capabilities.note: Perform VSA sensor neutral position memorization after wheel alignment or suspension work

capabilities.label: Transmission Learning Reset After Replacement
capabilities.done_when: Transmission adaptation parameters cleared, ready for relearn
capabilities.note: Initialize transmission control module after assembly replacement; resets clutch learn and pressure maps

capabilities.label: ABS Module Diagnostic Scan
capabilities.done_when: ABS DTCs and status retrieved
capabilities.note: Comprehensive ABS/VSA module scan with solenoid and wheel speed sensor diagnostics

capabilities.label: SRS Airbag System Live Data
capabilities.done_when: SRS module status and sensor data displaying
capabilities.note: Monitor airbag module status, crash sensors, and pretensioner readiness

capabilities.label: A/C System Refrigerant Reset
capabilities.done_when: A/C system capacity data reset, compressor clutch functional
capabilities.note: Reset A/C refrigerant capacity learning and compressor cycling data after system evacuation and recharge

capabilities.label: Electric Power Steering Motor Test
capabilities.done_when: Motor response confirmed in both directions
capabilities.note: Command electric power steering motor activation; verify assist response and torque feedback

capabilities.label: Comfort Feature Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Settings applied and stored
capabilities.note: Code comfort features: seat heater settings, window auto-close, sunroof position memory, mirror tilt-down

capabilities.label: Gateway Full Vehicle Scan
capabilities.done_when: Scan Complete - All modules accessible
capabilities.note: Complete gateway scan of all interconnected ECUs via CAN/K-Line

capabilities.label: Single Module Diagnostics
capabilities.done_when: Module Status - OK or list of DTCs
capabilities.note: Scan specific ECU (engine, ABS, transmission, comfort, etc)

capabilities.label: Read Diagnostic Trouble Codes
capabilities.done_when: DTC List displayed or No Codes
capabilities.note: Read all stored and pending DTCs from selected module

capabilities.label: Clear Diagnostic Trouble Codes
capabilities.done_when: Memory cleared - Confirmed
capabilities.note: Erase all DTC memory from ECU after diagnosis

capabilities.label: OBD Readiness Status Check
capabilities.done_when: Readiness Status: All ready or list pending
capabilities.note: Check MIL readiness monitors; required for emissions certification

capabilities.label: Engine Measuring Blocks (Live Data)
capabilities.done_when: Live parameter display active
capabilities.note: Real-time engine parameters: RPM, fuel pressure, ignition timing, O2 sensors, temp

capabilities.label: ABS System Measuring Blocks
capabilities.done_when: Live ABS sensor readings displayed
capabilities.note: Real-time ABS wheel speed sensors, brake pressure, control status

capabilities.label: Transmission Measuring Blocks
capabilities.done_when: Live transmission parameters active
capabilities.note: DSG/automatic: fluid temp, pressure, gear selection, shift status; manual: clutch

capabilities.label: Engine Oil Change Reset
capabilities.done_when: Oil service interval reset - Confirmed
capabilities.note: Reset engine oil change service interval in dash display and ECU

capabilities.label: EPB Rear Pad Replacement Procedure
capabilities.done_when: Brake service mode exited - Pads replaced
capabilities.note: Electronic parking brake calipers open for rear pad service. Requires stable power supply (battery charger)

capabilities.label: Throttle Body Alignment / Adaptation
capabilities.done_when: TBA complete - Throttle calibrated
capabilities.note: Electronic throttle learns full open/close range. Required after throttle replacement or major sensor work. Prerequisites: no DTCs, battery 11.5V+, coolant 5-95°C

capabilities.label: TPMS Storage / Relearn Procedure
capabilities.done_when: Tire pressures stored - System armed
capabilities.note: Store current tire pressures in indirect TPMS. All 4 tires must be at correct pressure per door placard

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Sensor G85 Calibration
capabilities.done_when: G85 calibration complete - Value within -1.5 to +1.5°
capabilities.note: Zero-position calibration for ESP steering angle sensor. Prerequisites: straight line <20 km/h, level ground, wheels parallel. Post-calibration: steering limit stops check

capabilities.label: DPF Regeneration (TDI Diesel)
capabilities.done_when: Regeneration cycle complete - Soot cleared
capabilities.note: Force DPF active regeneration. Prerequisites: fuel >1/4 tank, coolant >85°C, gear P/N, parking brake on, no DTCs. Monitors soot burn at 1000-1200°F

capabilities.label: DSG Transmission Basic Setting Reset
capabilities.done_when: Mechatronic basic setting confirmed
capabilities.note: Transmission adaptation after clutch pack, mechatronic, or DSG replacement. Clears P175F00 fault. Requires >20 min runtime at operating temp

capabilities.label: Haldex AWD Coupler Service Reset
capabilities.done_when: Haldex pump primed - System ready
capabilities.note: Relearn and prime procedure after Haldex fluid/filter service. Access module 22 basic settings for pump motor prime. Warm engine and haldex to temp

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Activation Test
capabilities.done_when: Pump running audibly or voltage monitored
capabilities.note: Command fuel pump relay to activate. Verify pump operation by sound or fuel pressure gauge

capabilities.label: Fuel Injector Buzz Test
capabilities.done_when: Injector clicks heard / solenoid response confirmed
capabilities.note: Command individual or all injectors to open/close. Verify mechanical response and electrical circuit continuity

capabilities.label: EVAP Purge Valve Control Test
capabilities.done_when: Valve actuation confirmed - Click/flow detected
capabilities.note: Energize/de-energize EVAP canister purge solenoid. Listen for valve click or monitor fuel vapor flow

capabilities.label: Electronic Parking Brake Retract Test
capabilities.done_when: EPB motor energized - Parking brake released
capabilities.note: Command EPB module to fully release brake. Safety: vehicle on level ground, in gear with handbrake test mode active

capabilities.label: Secondary Air Injection Pump Test
capabilities.done_when: Air pump running / solenoid clicks heard
capabilities.note: Activate EVAP secondary air pump during cold start diagnostics. Confirms pump motor and solenoid function

capabilities.label: Component Protection / SVM Status Check
capabilities.done_when: CP enabled/disabled status reported
capabilities.note: Read current component protection (CP) and Software Version Management (SVM) status. NOTE: X431 cannot REMOVE protection; requires ODIS with dealership credentials

capabilities.label: Immobilizer Key Adaptation (Std / Kessy)
capabilities.done_when: Key programmed and synchronized to ECU
capabilities.note: Add new/replacement keys to Immo III or Kessy system. Requires Kessy IC access for Audi A8/Touareg/Phaeton. Requires additional key programmer hardware (IMMO Plus/Elite)

capabilities.label: Kessy Comfort System Key Programming
capabilities.done_when: Kessy IC synchronized - Key tested
capabilities.note: Program/reprogram Kessy smart entry keys. Synchronizes EZS (immobilizer) and comfort module. Modern Audi/VW models with pushstart and no keyhole

capabilities.label: Long Coding Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Long coding value programmed and confirmed
capabilities.note: Modify 6-byte long coding values to enable/disable module features (lights, comfort, safety). Requires security access. Many options hidden behind bit flags

capabilities.label: Adaptation / Learning Channel Adjustment
capabilities.done_when: Adaptation value stored and verified
capabilities.note: Modify ECU adaptation values (fuel trim, timing, shift points, sensor offsets). Stored after vehicle startup confirmation

capabilities.label: Security Access Code Entry / Unlock
capabilities.done_when: Access level unlocked - Coding permitted
capabilities.note: Enter 4-byte security code to unlock ECU for long coding and adaptation. Codes per vehicle VIN; X431 can request auto-unlock via online service

capabilities.label: Gateway Module Installation List Update
capabilities.done_when: Module list updated in gateway ECU
capabilities.note: Update gateway ECU internal module address table after ECU replacement or addition. Critical for K-Line/CAN communication routing

capabilities.label: Instrument Cluster Service / Mileage Reset
capabilities.done_when: Cluster service mode confirmed / mileage synced
capabilities.note: Access cluster module for service intervals, warning lights, mileage sync after cluster replacement

capabilities.label: Infotainment FEC / Coding Configuration
capabilities.done_when: Infotainment feature coding applied and reboot complete
capabilities.note: Modify infotainment feature enabling (Nav, parking camera, phone control, ambient lighting). Reboot required for changes to take effect

capabilities.label: Comfort Module Feature Coding
capabilities.done_when: Feature configuration saved to comfort module
capabilities.note: Enable/disable comfort features: auto-locks at speed, rain sensor, headlight delay, seat comfort, locking/unlocking sequences

capabilities.label: TPMS Sensor ID Programming / Relearn
capabilities.done_when: All 4 tire sensor IDs learned and stored
capabilities.note: Learn/reprogram TPMS sensor IDs after wheel replacement. Direct method: manually trigger each sensor near antenna; indirect: driving trigger

capabilities.label: Battery Change Registration / Adaptation
capabilities.done_when: Battery registration confirmed in comfort module
capabilities.note: Register new battery (capacity, type) in comfort module after battery replacement. Enables correct charging strategy and load management

capabilities.label: Sunroof / Panoramic Roof Service Mode
capabilities.done_when: Roof positioned for service - Fully open or closed
capabilities.note: Open/close sunroof to service position without normal controls. Required for replacement or motor/switch troubleshooting

capabilities.label: Headlight Beam Alignment Adjustment
capabilities.done_when: Headlight beam height adjusted and verified
capabilities.note: Adjust headlight aim for left/right leveling, especially after suspension work or headlight replacement. Automated via light level sensor feedback

capabilities.label: Seat Memory / Position Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Seat full travel calibrated - Memory positions set
capabilities.note: Calibrate seat motors after replacement or ECU reset. Initialize lumbar, fore-aft, height, and backrest positions

capabilities.label: Full System Scan - All ECU Modules
capabilities.done_when: Scan completed, all modules identified
capabilities.note: Scans all available ECU modules (DME, DDE, FRM, SZL, gateway, etc.). E-series uses DCAN interface; F/G-series use ENET. Requires DOIP protocol support.

capabilities.label: Single ECU Module Scan - Select & Diagnose
capabilities.done_when: Module selected and scanned, status displayed
capabilities.note: Target specific module: Engine Control (DME/DDE), Transmission (EGS), Chassis (DSC/ABS), Body (FRM), Instrument Cluster (KOMBI), Steering (SZL). Different addressing for E/F/G series.

capabilities.label: Clear DTCs - Reset Fault Memory
capabilities.done_when: Fault memory cleared, confirmation displayed
capabilities.note: Clear active and stored fault codes from selected module. Some modules require special preconditions; verify module state before clearing.

capabilities.label: Shadow Memory & Freeze Frame Check
capabilities.done_when: Freeze frame data and shadow codes displayed
capabilities.note: Access freeze frame data (conditions at fault occurrence), shadow codes, and diagnostic trouble code history. Critical for intermittent fault diagnosis.

capabilities.label: Live Data - Transmission EGS Parameters
capabilities.done_when: Real-time transmission data stream active
capabilities.note: Monitor transmission control module: gear selection, shift pressure, torque converter slip, transmission oil temperature and pressure. Varies by transmission type (ZF, Aisin).

capabilities.label: Live Data - Chassis, Suspension & ABS
capabilities.done_when: Real-time chassis data streaming
capabilities.note: Monitor DSC/ABS module: wheel speeds, brake pressure, stability control status, suspension height (if air suspension). F/G-series with xDrive benefit from additional torque vectoring data.

capabilities.label: Service Reset - Oil Change & CBS Inspection
capabilities.done_when: Oil service and CBS inspection interval reset confirmed
capabilities.note: Reset oil service interval and Condition Based Service (CBS) inspection counters in instrument cluster. E-series uses different procedure than F/G-series.

capabilities.label: Electric Parking Brake - Pad Replacement & EMF Calibration
capabilities.done_when: EPB calibration completed, mechanical index reset
capabilities.note: After EPB brake pad replacement, perform electromagnetic force (EMF) calibration and mechanical index reset via FRM module. Critical for brake safety. F/G-series integrated parking brake differs from older mechanical designs.

capabilities.label: Throttle Body - Adaptation & Learning Reset
capabilities.done_when: Throttle adaptation completed, idle stable
capabilities.note: Reset throttle position sensor learning and electronic throttle unit adaptation after replacement or rough idle symptoms. Standard procedure: key on 90 sec, clear codes, key off 90 sec, restart.

capabilities.label: TPMS - Tire Pressure Sensor Reset & Relearn
capabilities.done_when: TPMS sensors detected and registered, pressure values displayed
capabilities.note: Register new TPMS sensors after replacement or tire rotation. E-series uses indirect method (ABS integration); F/G-series direct TPMS. May require driving distance after reset.

capabilities.label: Battery Registration - IBS Sensor Reset & Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Battery registered, age/capacity/chemistry confirmed in BMS
capabilities.note: Register new battery after replacement. Resets Intelligent Battery Sensor (IBS) age counter and capacity. Critical post-replacement procedure. FRM module manages battery status. Different procedures for AGM vs standard batteries.

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Calibration - SZL Module Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Steering angle sensor calibrated, SZL learned new neutral point
capabilities.note: Calibrate steering angle sensor integrated into SZL (Steering Column Module) after replacement or after wheel alignment work. Procedure: turn wheel full left, full right, or drive 30-40 km/h. Required before DSC initialization.

capabilities.label: DPF Regeneration - Forced Diesel Particulate Filter Regen
capabilities.done_when: Regeneration cycle completed, DDE soot load cleared, warning light off
capabilities.note: Perform forced regeneration of diesel particulate filter (DDE module). Engine RPM typically rises to 2000-2500 RPM; process takes 15-30 minutes. Not applicable to petrol DME engines. Requires adequate fuel level.

capabilities.label: Transmission - EGS Adaptation Reset & Relearning
capabilities.done_when: Transmission adaptation reset, learning data cleared, relearning initiated
capabilities.note: Reset transmission adaptation after ECU replacement or after major repairs. EGS module will relearn shift characteristics. Requires test drive after reset. Procedure differs between automatic and manual transmission variants.

capabilities.label: Bidirectional Control - Injector Activation & Pulse Test
capabilities.done_when: Injector(s) pulsing audibly, fuel spray verified
capabilities.note: Activate individual fuel injectors sequentially via DME/DDE to test solenoid operation and detect clogged/stuck injectors. Select injector 1/2/3/4/6 (or 1-6 for I-series). Listen for distinctive clicking.

capabilities.label: Bidirectional Control - Electric Water Pump Activation
capabilities.done_when: Electric water pump running, coolant flow detected or pump noise heard
capabilities.note: Activate electric water pump (if equipped) via DME. Newer F/G-series engines with variable coolant management use electric pump; older E-series use engine-driven pump. Feel hose temperature rise.

capabilities.label: Bidirectional Control - Valvetronic Motor Adjustment & Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Valvetronic motor repositioned, intake valve lift calibrated
capabilities.note: Adjust valvetronic camshaft lift motor via DME after replacement or maintenance. Listen for characteristic motor operation; excessive noise indicates mechanical binding. Petrol engines only (N-series, N2x engines).

capabilities.label: Programming - Key Learning & FEM-BDC Registration
capabilities.done_when: New key(s) registered in FEM module, IMMO synchronization complete
capabilities.note: Program new vehicle keys and register in Front Electronic Module (FEM) or Body Domain Controller (BDC). Requires master/existing key present. F/G-series BDC differs from older FEM architecture. Critical security function.

capabilities.label: Programming - ECU Flash & Reprogramming (ISTA/D Equivalent)
capabilities.done_when: ECU firmware updated, checksum verified, module reinitialized
capabilities.note: Reprogram ECU firmware after corruption or update. Equivalent to ISTA/D flashing. Supports DME, DDE, EGS, FRM modules. Do NOT interrupt process. E-series uses DCAN; F/G-series ENET. Requires stable power and connection.

capabilities.label: Programming - ECU Initialization (Virgin ECU Setup)
capabilities.done_when: Virgin ECU initialized, IMMO data written, module ready for key coding
capabilities.note: Initialize completely virgin (unprogrammed) ECU with baseline software and vehicle identifiers. Necessary before key learning or coding. Requires VIN and original part number.

capabilities.label: Coding - FA/VO (Vehicle Order) Edit & Update
capabilities.done_when: FA/VO coding values read, edited, and written; vehicle configuration updated
capabilities.note: Read and edit Factory Authorized (FA) and Vehicle Order (VO) coding data via FRM or gateway module. Controls vehicle features, options, and configuration. E-series uses different coding format than F/G-series. Requires SALAPA access.

capabilities.label: Coding - Retrofit Coding (e.g. Video-in-Motion, Feature Unlock)
capabilities.done_when: Retrofit coding applied, feature enabled, no conflicts detected
capabilities.note: Apply retrofit coding to enable features like video-in-motion (VIM), comfort functions, or equipment adaptations. Common retrofits: coding KOMBI for new display, coding FRM for feature activation. Coding persists across ISTA flashing if using proper method.

capabilities.label: Coding - Engine Control Parameter Coding (DME/DDE)
capabilities.done_when: Engine control parameters coded, adaptation values set, module ready
capabilities.note: Code engine control parameters in DME (petrol) or DDE (diesel) such as displacement, fuel type, catalyst type, and performance variants. Required after ECU replacement or when converting between engine variants.

capabilities.label: Module - FRM Footwell Module Initialization & Coding
capabilities.done_when: FRM module initialized, lighting and comfort functions operational
capabilities.note: Initialize Front-Right Module (FRM) or equivalent body module controlling lighting, comfort, and power distribution. Requires coding vehicle configuration and testing all integrated functions (headlights, wipers, locks, heating).

capabilities.label: Module - CAS/FEM Gateway Module Coding & Integration
capabilities.done_when: Gateway module configured, all connected modules responding to gateway commands
capabilities.note: Code and initialize Central Authentication System (CAS) or Front Electronic Module (FEM) gateway. Manages vehicle bus communication, key authentication, and module integration. E-series CAS differs from F-series FEM and G-series BDC architecture.

capabilities.label: Module - Instrument Cluster Mileage Verification & Coding
capabilities.done_when: Cluster mileage verified against vehicle history, coding applied if needed
capabilities.note: Verify instrument cluster mileage against vehicle memory and perform safety checks. Code cluster for configuration (speedometer type, fuel gauge range, unit display language). E-series uses analog; F/G-series digital with customizable display.

capabilities.label: Service - ABS/DSC System Initialization & Bleeding
capabilities.done_when: ABS/DSC module initialized, system test passed, no brake warnings
capabilities.note: Initialize and bleed ABS/DSC system after brake work or module replacement. Automated procedure cycles pump and solenoid valves to purge air. Requires clean brake fluid and proper brake pedal monitoring.

capabilities.label: Bidirectional Control - DSC Pump Motor Test
capabilities.done_when: DSC pump motor running smoothly, pressure feedback confirmed
capabilities.note: Activate DSC pump motor via ABS module to verify pump operation and detect blockages. Listen for consistent motor noise; grinding or slipping indicates air in system or internal failure.

capabilities.label: Service - Seat Belt Pretensioner Module Initialization
capabilities.done_when: Pretensioner module initialized, system test passed
capabilities.note: Initialize seat belt pretensioner system after module replacement or battery disconnect. SRS module manages pyrotechnic charge arming and test modes. Safety-critical function requiring careful procedure.

capabilities.label: Live Data - DSC/ABS Wheel Speed Sensors & Pressure
capabilities.done_when: Real-time wheel speed data and brake pressure streaming
capabilities.note: Monitor wheel speed sensors and brake system pressure via DSC/ABS module. Identifies ABS sensor faults, stuck calipers, and brake system imbalances. Test during light braking and cornering.

capabilities.label: Coding - Instrument Cluster Display Retrofit (6WB, 8.8-inch)
capabilities.done_when: New cluster type coded in FRM/gateway, display format activated, no conflicts
capabilities.note: Code instrument cluster upgrade from traditional analog to modern digital display (6WB, 8.8-inch, MFID). Requires VO coding update, cluster coding adjustment, and potential FRM parameter changes. F-series commonly retrofitted from E-series clusters.

capabilities.label: Service - Emission Monitor Readiness Status Check
capabilities.done_when: All emissions monitors operational, readiness status complete
capabilities.note: Check OBD emissions monitor readiness after service or ECU reset. Requires specific drive cycle completion (city + highway) to achieve 'ready' status for emission testing. Monitors include catalyst, O2 sensor, EGR, fuel system.

capabilities.label: Full System Diagnostic Scan
capabilities.done_when: All available control modules scanned and results displayed
capabilities.note: Scans all available ECUs and systems; requires auto-VIN detection enabled

capabilities.label: Quick Test Single ECU
capabilities.done_when: Single ECU test completed with diagnostic results
capabilities.note: Fast single-module test for quick diagnostics; useful for targeted troubleshooting

capabilities.label: Live Data Engine ME ECU
capabilities.done_when: Real-time engine parameters streaming and displayed
capabilities.note: Streams engine control unit parameters: cylinder pressure, common rail pressure, fuel injection timing, ignition advance

capabilities.label: Live Data ABS/ESP System
capabilities.done_when: Real-time brake system parameters streaming and displayed
capabilities.note: Streams ABS/ESP parameters: wheel speeds, brake pressure, lateral acceleration, system status

capabilities.label: Oil Service Reset ASSYST
capabilities.done_when: Service reminder reset confirmed and interval reset
capabilities.note: Resets oil change service interval via ASSYST; clears ASSYST Plus engine oil reminder

capabilities.label: EPB BAS Brake Pad Service Reset
capabilities.done_when: Brake pad wear indicator reset and reminder cleared
capabilities.note: Resets electronic parking brake (EPB) and brake assist (BAS) pad wear service reminder after pad replacement

capabilities.label: Throttle Valve Idle Learn Procedure
capabilities.done_when: Idle speed adaptation completed and idle values learned
capabilities.note: Relearn idle speed and throttle position after throttle body cleaning or replacement; M271/M272 engines

capabilities.label: SBC Brake Unit Reset Counter
capabilities.done_when: SBC threshold counter reset and warning light cleared
capabilities.note: Resets SBC (Sensotronic Brake Control) threshold counter for models W203-W211 (2000-2009); clears C249F/C2498 fault codes

capabilities.label: Steering Angle Calibration LWS
capabilities.done_when: Steering angle sensor calibrated and steering angle offset reset
capabilities.note: Calibrates Lane Keeping Assist (LWS) steering angle sensor after steering component replacement or alignment

capabilities.label: Transmission 722.9 Adaptation Reset
capabilities.done_when: Transmission adaptive learning cleared and reset to factory defaults
capabilities.note: Resets transmission adaptive values for 722.9 7G-Tronic automatic; requires proper voltage and ignition control; models W204-W212

capabilities.label: Fuel Pump Activation Test
capabilities.done_when: Fuel pump activated and deactivated; audible/pressure confirmation
capabilities.note: Activates fuel pump for test/prime; verifies pump operation and fuel delivery pressure

capabilities.label: EVAP Canister Purge Control Test
capabilities.done_when: EVAP purge valve actuated; system operation verified
capabilities.note: Tests EVAP purge control valve operation; detects charcoal canister and valve faults

capabilities.label: Secondary Air Pump Control Test
capabilities.done_when: Air pump activated; airflow/pressure confirmed
capabilities.note: Tests secondary air injection pump operation; critical for emissions system diagnostics

capabilities.label: SBC Brake System Bleeding Procedure
capabilities.done_when: Brake system bled and air removed; brake pressure stabilized
capabilities.note: Automated brake bleeding via SBC module for vehicles with ABS/ESP; eliminates manual bleeding; W203-W212 models

capabilities.label: Key Learn via SCN Online
capabilities.done_when: Key learned to vehicle and authentication verified
capabilities.note: Programs new keys via SCN (Smartphone Coding Network) online server; requires internet connection and online credentials; aftermarket limitations apply

capabilities.label: ECU SCN Online Coding
capabilities.done_when: ECU coded and software updated; configuration applied
capabilities.note: Performs online SCN coding for ECU modifications; downloads latest firmware; restricted to year 2021 for PAD VII; regional limitations in North America/Spain

capabilities.label: EZS Ignition Switch Programming
capabilities.done_when: EZS module programmed and ignition switch synchronized
capabilities.note: Programs Electronic Start Switch (EZS) for newer models; includes ignition switch synchronization and immobilizer coding

capabilities.label: Variant Coding XENTRY Equivalent
capabilities.done_when: Vehicle variant parameters updated and applied
capabilities.note: Performs variant coding equivalent to XENTRY dealer tool; configures vehicle options and regional specifications

capabilities.label: EIS/EZS Module Pairing
capabilities.done_when: EIS and EZS modules paired and synchronized
capabilities.note: Pairs Engine Immobilizer System (EIS) with Electronic Start Switch (EZS); required after module replacement or battery disconnect

capabilities.label: Infotainment Module SCN Coding
capabilities.done_when: Infotainment module coded and media functions restored
capabilities.note: SCN coding for infotainment units; unlocks media and navigation features; requires online authentication

capabilities.label: SBC Bleed Procedure W221 Older S-Class
capabilities.done_when: Brake system fully bled and pressure stabilized
capabilities.note: Complete automated SBC brake bleeding sequence for older S-Class (W221 and earlier); includes full system evacuation and refill

capabilities.label: Airmatic Suspension Level Calibration
capabilities.done_when: Suspension level adjusted to standard height and locked
capabilities.note: Calibrates air suspension system; adjusts ride height via F3-F10 function keys; applies to W204-W212 models with Airmatic

capabilities.label: 4MATIC Transfer Case Reset
capabilities.done_when: Transfer case module reset and all-wheel-drive system reinitialized
capabilities.note: Resets 4MATIC all-wheel-drive transfer case; performed after drivetrain component replacement or electronic reinitialization

capabilities.label: Battery Registration Same Type Capacity
capabilities.done_when: Battery registered and system adaptation complete
capabilities.note: Registers battery replacement with same type and capacity; required for proper power management and charging regulation

capabilities.label: Battery Registration Different Capacity
capabilities.done_when: Battery capacity difference registered and charging adjusted
capabilities.note: Registers battery replacement with same type but different capacity; adjusts charging algorithm and system parameters

capabilities.label: Battery Registration Different Type
capabilities.done_when: Different battery type registered and systems recalibrated
capabilities.note: Registers completely different battery type (AGM vs Standard); recalibrates all voltage-dependent vehicle systems; critical for system stability
